title: matthiola taurica
intro: Matthiola taurica, also known as Horned Poppy or Hornpoppy, is a flowering plant species in the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Matthiola taurica include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Matthiola taurica is often used as a tincture or infusion, and it can also be applied topically to the skin in the form of a salve or cream.
